nodes.label: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.short_label: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.title: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. summary.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.
nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology
nodes.short_label: Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology
nodes.title: Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology
nodes.description: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Powell が 4/29 に Chair 任期終了 (5/15) 後も理事会に残る決定が 2026年金融政策市場心理を再構築 — 2026年 Q4 までに FOMC は Warsh Chair 体制下で反対票 ≤2 のより小さい反対規範に戻るが、Powell の理事会継続在任は金利ではなく Fed 調査ガバナンス問題のマージナルスイング票となる。** 4/29 は 1992年10月以来の最多反対 FOMC (8-4); Miran は -25bp を主張; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan は緩和バイアス含めることに反対。同日 Warsh 指名が上院銀行委員会を通過。2026-2027年セットアップ: Warsh が Chair 席で Powell が 2028年任期末まで理事会に在任; Chair がフレーミングを設定するため、利率コールでは反対姿勢が圧縮; トランプ政権 Fed 調査の結果が動くたびに Powell のマージナル票はガバナンスシグナルになる。市場は金利のフォワードガイダンスボラティリティを下げ、Fed 自体の制度リスクプレミアムを上げる方向に値付けする。1992年の前例比較は珍奇な話題ではなく、新しい Fed ガバナンス体制の金融プレス解説における構造的参照点になる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **(No tecnológica) La decisión de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicología del mercado de política monetaria 2026 — para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (≤2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuestión de gobernanza de la investigación Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con más disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quería -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajación. La nominación de Warsh avanzó del Comité Bancario del Senado el mismo día. La configuración 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sillón del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en señal de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigación Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparación con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo régimen de gobernanza Fed. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

label.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
label.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

description.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.title: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。 In plain language: 攻撃者がAIツールのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを組み合わせて共有AIサーバを乗っ取れる。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así. In plain language: Hackers pueden encadenar bug de tooling AI con bug del kernel Linux para tomar servidores AI compartidos. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito. In plain language: Pwedeng pagsamahin ng hackers ang AI-tooling bug + Linux-kernel bug para makuha ang shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。 In plain language: 攻撃者がAIツールのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを組み合わせて共有AIサーバを乗っ取れる。 In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así. In plain language: Hackers pueden encadenar bug de tooling AI con bug del kernel Linux para tomar servidores AI compartidos. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito. In plain language: Pwedeng pagsamahin ng hackers ang AI-tooling bug + Linux-kernel bug para makuha ang shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.short_label: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.title: Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative
nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブをリセット — Q3 2026 にハイパースケーラー初の「トークン マージン ゲート」による AI 設備投資階層化が公表される。** Alphabet (1,750〜1,850 億ドル)、Amazon (約 2,000 億ドル)、Meta (1,150〜1,350 億ドル)、Microsoft (Azure ラガード再評価リスク) の 2026 年合計 capex ガイダンスはおよそ 6,500〜7,000 億ドルに達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI 現実点検」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算で **トークンあたり収益のエグジット ベロシティ** テーゼが検証されるか、マルチプル圧縮が引き起こされるかが分かれる。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラーのうち少なくとも 1 社が、Bedrock/Azure/Vertex の **トークン マージン下限** を増分 GPU 設備投資の条件として **公的に明示** する。これは公開クラウドからの最初の明示的「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」であり、2024-2025 の「投資せざるを得ない」教義の終焉を告げる。フロンティア ラボのアンカーディール (Google 400 億 / Anthropic、Amazon 250 億 / Anthropic、OpenAI 200 億 / Cerebras + Microsoft) は可視的な圧力リリースバルブとなる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 verá al primer hyperscaler que escalonará públicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validarán la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenarán una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionará públicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" explícito desde una nube pública, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la válvula visible de alivio. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative — sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブをリセット — Q3 2026 にハイパースケーラー初の「トークン マージン ゲート」による AI 設備投資階層化が公表される。** Alphabet (1,750〜1,850 億ドル)、Amazon (約 2,000 億ドル)、Meta (1,150〜1,350 億ドル)、Microsoft (Azure ラガード再評価リスク) の 2026 年合計 capex ガイダンスはおよそ 6,500〜7,000 億ドルに達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI 現実点検」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算で **トークンあたり収益のエグジット ベロシティ** テーゼが検証されるか、マルチプル圧縮が引き起こされるかが分かれる。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラーのうち少なくとも 1 社が、Bedrock/Azure/Vertex の **トークン マージン下限** を増分 GPU 設備投資の条件として **公的に明示** する。これは公開クラウドからの最初の明示的「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」であり、2024-2025 の「投資せざるを得ない」教義の終焉を告げる。フロンティア ラボのアンカーディール (Google 400 億 / Anthropic、Amazon 250 億 / Anthropic、OpenAI 200 億 / Cerebras + Microsoft) は可視的な圧力リリースバルブとなる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 verá al primer hyperscaler que escalonará públicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validarán la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenarán una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionará públicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" explícito desde una nube pública, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la válvula visible de alivio. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve. nodes.title: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first
nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.fil: Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang

description.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + FOMC(4/28-29)が、ハイパースケーラーによる初の**トークンあたりマージンゲート型設備投資**開示を2026年Q3までに引き出す — 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium シリコンレベル契約が新ドクトリンを支える。** 2026年のMag 7合計設備投資 約$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約$200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft FY26 約$146BでFY27は$170Bへ)は、すでに「設備投資を信用で評価する」段階から「実利を要求する」段階へ移行した相場に着地する。**4/27の契約再構築はAIラボの計算需要をハイパースケーラー所有のシリコンへ明示的にルーティング**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU を大規模に)。2026年Q3までに、Big-3ハイパースケーラーの少なくとも1社が**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークンあたりマージン下限に基づき増分GPU設備投資をゲート化**する公的開示を行う — 公開クラウドからの初の「AIインフラROIスレッショルド」。NVDA $5T級時価総額とAMD / Cerebras IPOの軌道は維持される; 支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は変わる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan explícitamente el cómputo de los laboratorios IA a través de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 públicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" explícito desde una nube pública. La capitalización clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite"
title.ja: OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する
title.es: El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026
title.fil: Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite"

description.en: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
