nodes.title: The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite
nodes.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have. description.ja: **4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have. nodes.description: **The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Mag 7 ウィーク + $700B AI 設備投資数値 + 4/30 Apple の +$1,000億自社株買い + 4% 増配の組み合わせで、2026年は AI 設備投資の開示が二系統に分化する年となる — 2026 Q4 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(4/29 に AI ランレート $37B(+123%)を開示済みの Microsoft が最有力)が AI 事業 KPI(ランレート、課金シート、デプロイ済みエージェント)の月次 10-Q 脚注開示に踏み切り、より広い S&P AI コホート(Apple、上場後 Cerebras、Broadcom)が AI 事業別マージン四半期開示で続く。** 4/29 Microsoft の $37B AI ランレート(+123%)が開示の前例、4/30 Apple のサービス売上過去最高 $30.98B(+16%)に AI サービス別行はなし、4/30 Big Tech Q1 設備投資 $130B 超 → 2026年通期 $700B が買い手側の圧力数値、5月中旬 Cerebras IPO の $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% の収益集中)が開示の負荷試験。4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達 + 4/29 Mag 7 のまだら戻り(META -7.5%、MSFT -3.8% on print day)が示すとおり、公開市場は不正確な AI 売上数値に対して既に価格差別を始めている。SEC の介入を待たず、最も開示する 1 社が前例を打ち、コホートを追従させる経路が最小抵抗。買い手側こそが駆動力。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el día de la publicación) muestran que el mercado público ya está discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la divulgación voluntaria — la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences **Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure — ang buyside ang forcing function. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary_short_locales.es: No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences **Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test.

detail.description: **The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Mag 7 ウィーク + $700B AI 設備投資数値 + 4/30 Apple の +$1,000億自社株買い + 4% 増配の組み合わせで、2026年は AI 設備投資の開示が二系統に分化する年となる — 2026 Q4 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(4/29 に AI ランレート $37B(+123%)を開示済みの Microsoft が最有力)が AI 事業 KPI(ランレート、課金シート、デプロイ済みエージェント)の月次 10-Q 脚注開示に踏み切り、より広い S&P AI コホート(Apple、上場後 Cerebras、Broadcom)が AI 事業別マージン四半期開示で続く。** 4/29 Microsoft の $37B AI ランレート(+123%)が開示の前例、4/30 Apple のサービス売上過去最高 $30.98B(+16%)に AI サービス別行はなし、4/30 Big Tech Q1 設備投資 $130B 超 → 2026年通期 $700B が買い手側の圧力数値、5月中旬 Cerebras IPO の $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% の収益集中)が開示の負荷試験。4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達 + 4/29 Mag 7 のまだら戻り(META -7.5%、MSFT -3.8% on print day)が示すとおり、公開市場は不正確な AI 売上数値に対して既に価格差別を始めている。SEC の介入を待たず、最も開示する 1 社が前例を打ち、コホートを追従させる経路が最小抵抗。買い手側こそが駆動力。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el día de la publicación) muestran que el mercado público ya está discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la divulgación voluntaria — la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. nodes.title: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility
nodes.description: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility **Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility — pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.summary_short: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window.

summary_short_locales.ja: **Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる
summary_short_locales.es: No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo.

detail.description: Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.
nodes.short_label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.
nodes.title: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.title: By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
