description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。 In plain language: Microsoft が AI エージェント ID を Microsoft・Amazon・Google クラウド間で動かせるようにした — まもなくその仕様を固定する公開規格が出る。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. In plain language: Microsoft acaba de hacer que las IDs de agente AI funcionen entre nubes Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo fijará. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Pinagana ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang i-lock-in iyon ng public spec. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。 In plain language: Microsoft が AI エージェント ID を Microsoft・Amazon・Google クラウド間で動かせるようにした — まもなくその仕様を固定する公開規格が出る。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. In plain language: Microsoft acaba de hacer que las IDs de agente AI funcionen entre nubes Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo fijará. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Pinagana ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang i-lock-in iyon ng public spec. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab
nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「フロンティア AI ラボ × Tier-1 クラウドの容量囲い込み」が 2026 Q3 までに完全分割線として確定** — Google Cloud 単月で Anthropic（GB300 + TPU 大型契約）、Meta（GB300 容量）、Thinking Machines Lab（A4X Max）の 3 件を確定させた事実は、「フロンティアモデル開発に十分な容量を持つクラウドは 3 社（AWS / Azure / GCP）に絞られる」構造の固定化を意味する。Amazon が Anthropic に **追加 $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 容量 + 10 年 $100B コミット** で対抗、Azure は OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection 系を握り、GCP は Anthropic / TML / Meta を加える。2026 Q3 までに「自社クラウドを持たない / フロンティアラボとの長期容量契約を持たない第 4 のハイパースケーラ候補」（Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave など）は **「フロンティア訓練不可能だが推論最適化に特化」** へ位置付けが完全シフトし、AI チップ生態系は「訓練容量 = 3 社寡占 / 推論 = 多層化」の二層構造に固まる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template
nodes.short_label: The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template
nodes.title: The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template
nodes.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack
title.ja: Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する
title.es: Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor
title.fil: Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers. nodes.label: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.short_label: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.title: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。 In plain language: Microsoftが「AIエージェント管理」に値段を付けた — 他クラウドも追随するか顧客を失うか。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo. In plain language: Microsoft puso un precio al control de agentes IA — otros clouds copiarán o perderán clientes. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence. In plain language: Naglagay ang Microsoft ng presyo sa kontrol ng AI agents — ibang clouds dapat sumunod o mawalan ng kustomer. In plain language: In plain language:

detail.summary_short: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender).

summary_short_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender).
summary_short_locales.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サー
summary_short_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender).
summary_short_locales.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender).

detail.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。 In plain language: Microsoftが「AIエージェント管理」に値段を付けた — 他クラウドも追随するか顧客を失うか。 In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo. In plain language: Microsoft puso un precio al control de agentes IA — otros clouds copiarán o perderán clientes. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence. In plain language: Naglagay ang Microsoft ng presyo sa kontrol ng AI agents — ibang clouds dapat sumunod o mawalan ng kustomer.
