description.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。 In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: Las ventas de chips AI en China de AMD acaban de caer 75 por ciento en un trimestre — Wall Street demandará que las empresas chip separen sus ingresos AI como una línea aparte. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: Ang AMD's China AI chip sales ay bumagsak ng 75 percent sa isang quarter — hihingiin ng Wall Street sa mga chip companies na ihiwalay ang kanilang AI revenue bilang isang separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

detail.summary_short: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once.

summary_short_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once.
summary_short_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日
summary_short_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez.
summary_short_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay.

detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。 In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:

El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: Las ventas de chips AI en China de AMD acaban de caer 75 por ciento en un trimestre — Wall Street demandará que las empresas chip separen sus ingresos AI como una línea aparte. nodes.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. nodes.title: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行** — DeepSeek V4 の「1M context をボルトオンではなくゼロから設計」方針、Qwen3.6-27B の 262K→1M、Claude Opus 4.7 の 1M token context（Bedrock）、GPT-5.5 の長文脈強化は同じ方向。2026 Q3 までに「native 1M context」がオープン重みの最低ラインとなり、32K-128K 止まりの既存モデルはレガシー扱いに転落。RAG パイプラインは「検索→コンテキスト挿入」から「全データをそのまま投入＋動的プルーニング」方式に主流シフトし、ベクトル DB ベンダは「長 context キャッシュ最適化層」として再定義を迫られる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。 In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la ola de updates Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning con contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y 2x más contexto (engineering conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 mar runtime 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors + guía de fine-tuning NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage (rendimiento RTX-laptop sube 2.5x) — combinada con la ventaja de throughput 29% de SGLang en H100 (prefix-cache RadixAttention compartida con vLLM a ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv del 28 abril-3 mayo sobre KV-cache (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace al entrenamiento con GPU consumer operativamente equivalente al baseline 2024 con GPU empresarial; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un tier managed Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime managed + IAM + audit + pool GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning antes de los ciclos AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría procurement-friction: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven economía de reducción 70% VRAM en GPUs consumer, pero la seguridad + governance empresarial demandan un plano de control managed que el CLI open-source no provee; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM. In plain language: El entrenamiento de LLMs local es ahora el doble de rápido y usa 70% menos VRAM — pronto las grandes nubes lo rentarán como servicio managed. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay parehong may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Ang local-LLM training ngayon ay dalawang beses na mas mabilis at gumagamit ng 70% mas kaunting VRAM — malapit na itong i-rent out ng malalaking clouds bilang managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Business
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。 In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:

Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM.
